name: innovation-rh-connect
description: Sistema de RH com controle de ponto e comunicação via WhatsApp para pequenas e médias empresas

scripts.build: npm run validate && npm run build:api && npm run build:web
scripts.prisma:format: npm --prefix apps/api exec -- prisma format --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:validate: npm --prefix apps/api exec -- prisma validate --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.prisma:generate: npm --prefix apps/api exec -- prisma generate --schema apps/api/prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.validate: npm run check:workspace && npm run prisma:validate && npm run prisma:generate && npm run lint:web && npm run typecheck:api && npm run typecheck:web

author: Innovation RH Connect Team
